Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm about to head to the art club. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}Can you make time for art club today? I'd really appreciate it if you could come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school at the art club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm about to head to the art club. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can you make time for art club today? I'd really appreciate it if you could come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}In any case, now that we're finally done, the art club can be more active again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}In any case, we're finally done. I studied pretty hard this time around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm about to head to club... What are you going to do today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right! I'm about to head to club... What are you going to do today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}For now, draw whatever you want. Just let me know if you have any questions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I just got here myself. Are you going to be at the art club today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, are you going to be at the art club today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11293 0 0}Great! Looking forward to seeing you there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh yeah, that reminds me... I let the club advisor know about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}Will you be attending club activities today? I need to talk to you about the future...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, will you be attending club activities today? I need to talk to you about the future...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}...The talk can wait. I think everyone's waiting on us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11201 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun, do you think you can make it to art club today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, are you going to art club today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, never mind. Let's just focus on making some art.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right. Are you going to art club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11202 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun, do you think you can make it to art club today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun, do you think you can make it to art club today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}*yawn* I'm feeling a little tired today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}Never mind, it's nothing. We can talk about that later. I should go see how everyone's doing first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's something I need to tell everyone today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, as the club leader, I'd like for you to be there, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's something I need to tell everyone today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, as the club leader, I'd like for you to be there, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think everyone else is already there, so let's just draw like we usually do first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11246 0 0}Are you busy? Maybe next time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11246 0 0}Oh, all right then. Be careful on your way home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11246 0 0}Oh, are you busy? Come drop by if you ever feel like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11246 0 0}Oh... I'm sorry to hear that. Maybe next time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11214 0 0}Oh, did you already have plans? I'll see you later, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11290 0 0}O-Oh... Then I guess today won't work out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, I was just talking to myself... You're heading home, right? Take care.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11214 0 0}Oh well, nothing we can do about that. Let's try again next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EVENTPLAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Message issued by the script. [n]{f 1 5 0}Comm Event Replay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_PERSPNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if we can grow closer thanks to the[n]{f 2 4 2} Persona, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with the elderly couple...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to {f 2 4 0} soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_RANKUP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to the elderly couple soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_NORMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem that our relationship[n]can get any closer than it is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend time with them...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_AS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_DT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND__GENERAL_MSG_NET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time online playing[n]the MMORPG with {f 2 4 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_NT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with the {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_FASHION_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school at the fashion club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night[n]with {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}未使用ラベルです。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}
